description: Laminar is an observability platform for AI agents and LLM applications. It helps teams trace runs, inspect failures, manage datasets and evaluations, and debug agent behavior over time.
summary: Laminar exposes a project-authenticated HTTP API used by its SDK client, a project-authenticated MCP server at `https://api.lmnr.ai/v1/mcp`, and an npm CLI (`lmnr-cli`) that authenticates as a signed-in user via OAuth device flow.
